title: Pelvic Lymph Node Assessment:
content: Current imaging shows a suspicious left external iliac lymph node. PET/CT is missing, so supplemental imaging is recommended before finalizing the treatment plan.

title: Parametrial Invasion Assessment:
content: Current MRI shows an unclear parametrial interface. Contrast-enhanced MRI and DWI are recommended for further evaluation of parametrial invasion.

title: Final Recommendation:
content: Current evidence is insufficient to form a definitive preoperative assessment conclusion. After supplemental imaging data are available, further treatment planning through MDT discussion is recommended.
